instructions.name: init_check_prediction_comp_def
docs: Init the `check_prediction` computation definition (call once).

instructions.name: init_market
docs: Create a market for a TxODDS fixture with a fixed per-prediction stake.

instructions.name: init_store_prediction_comp_def
docs: Init the `store_prediction` computation definition (call once).

instructions.name: resolve_match
docs: Resolve the market by proving the outcome through a Txoracle `validate_stat` CPI.

accounts.name: daily_scores_roots
docs: The `daily_scores_merkle_roots` PDA owned by the Txoracle program.
Read-only; validated by the Txoracle program itself.

accounts.name: txoracle_program
docs: The Txoracle program we CPI into. Address checked against TXORACLE_PROGRAM_ID.

instructions.name: settle_prediction
docs: Compare the encrypted prediction against the resolved outcome; queues payout.

accounts.name: user
docs: The user who submitted the prediction; receives the payout if correct.

accounts.name: prediction
docs: The prediction account the encrypted state is written into.

instructions.name: submit_prediction
docs: Stake SOL and submit an encrypted prediction; queues re-encryption to MXE state.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the market authority may perform this action

errors.name: NotResolved
errors.msg: Market has not been resolved yet

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Claimed outcome is not a valid outcome value

errors.name: InvalidOracleProgram
errors.msg: CPI target is not the expected Txoracle program

errors.name: OracleNoReturnData
errors.msg: Txoracle returned no data from validate_stat

errors.name: OracleRejected
errors.msg: Oracle rejected the claimed outcome (validate_stat returned false)

errors.name: PredictionNotStored
errors.msg: Encrypted prediction state has not been stored yet

errors.name: InsufficientVault
errors.msg: Vault has insufficient funds for payout

types.name: CheckPredictionOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: ClockAccount
docs: An account storing the current network epoch

types.name: ComputationDefinitionAccount
docs: An account representing a [ComputationDefinition] in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationDefinitionMeta
docs: A computation definition for execution in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationSignature
docs: The signature of a computation defined in a [ComputationDefinition].

types.name: Epoch
docs: The network epoch

types.name: LeaderChoice
docs: The computation chosen by a node to be executed when the node is leader.

types.name: LeaderInfo
docs: The information about a node.

types.name: LeaderSelector
docs: To select a Leader.
Uses the greatest divisors method: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/D%27Hondt_method

types.name: MXEAccount
docs: A MPC Execution Environment.

types.name: Market
docs: One prediction market, tied to a single TxODDS fixture (match).

fields.name: authority
docs: Creator/admin — the only key allowed to resolve the match.

fields.name: fixture_id
docs: TxODDS fixture id this market settles against.

fields.name: stake_amount
docs: Fixed stake (lamports) every prediction must post.

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Total lamports posted across all predictions (held in the vault PDA).

fields.name: prediction_count
docs: Number of predictions submitted.

fields.name: resolved
docs: Whether the match has been resolved via the Txoracle CPI.

fields.name: outcome
docs: Resolved outcome: 0 home / 1 away / 2 draw, 255 while unresolved.

fields.name: is_knockout
docs: True if this fixture is a knockout-stage match (can go to extra time /
penalties). Set at init by the (off-chain) creator from the competition
round; group-stage matches set this false.

fields.name: needs_manual_review
docs: Set true when the oracle confirms a full-time+extra-time DRAW on a
knockout fixture. Goal totals (stat keys 1/2, which include ET) can't
identify a penalty-shootout winner, so the market is flagged for manual
review instead of silently resolving as a draw. Settlement stays blocked
(resolved remains false) while this is true.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for the Market PDA.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump for the associated Vault PDA.

types.name: MxeStatus
docs: The status of an MXE.

types.name: NodeMetadata
docs: location as [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html) country code

types.name: NodeRef
docs: A reference to a node in the cluster.
The offset is to derive the Node Account.

types.name: Output
docs: An output of a computation.
We currently don't support encrypted outputs yet since encrypted values are passed via
data objects.

types.name: Parameter
docs: A parameter of a computation.
We differentiate between plaintext and encrypted parameters and data objects.
Plaintext parameters are directly provided as their value.
Encrypted parameters are provided as an offchain reference to the data.
Data objects are provided as a reference to the data object account.

types.name: Prediction
docs: A single user's encrypted prediction for a market.
The prediction itself is stored encrypted under the MXE (`Enc<Mxe, u8>`) —
`ciphertext` + `nonce` are populated by the `store_prediction` circuit
callback in Phase 2. Until then they stay zeroed.

fields.name: stake
docs: Lamports this user staked (equals the market's stake_amount).

fields.name: ciphertext
docs: Encrypted prediction ciphertext (Enc<Mxe, u8>), written by the store callback.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Nonce for the encrypted prediction.

fields.name: encrypted
docs: True once the encrypted prediction state has been written.

fields.name: settled
docs: True once settle_prediction has run for this prediction.

fields.name: correct
docs: Result of settlement (only meaningful when `settled`).

fields.name: key
docs: Stat key (e.g. 1 = home goals, 2 = away goals). See PROJECT_CONTEXT.md.

types.name: SetUnset
docs: Utility struct to store a value that needs to be set by a certain number of participants (keys
in our case). Once all participants have set the value, the value is considered set and we only
store it once.

types.name: StorePredictionOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: Vault
docs: Program-owned lamport vault for a market. Holds no data beyond its bump so
that payouts are a direct lamport transfer (no `invoke_signed` needed).
